projectDescription: A comprehensive Star Wars mod for Hytale featuring lightsabers, blasters, droids, and iconic Star Wars environments.
keyFeatures: Multiple lightsaber variants with different colors and styles (Anakin, Luke, Darksaber)
Kyber crystal system with different colors and Force alignments
Blaster weapons including DC-15A and Cycler Rifle
Custom Star Wars environments (Tatooine, Ilum, Spaceship)
R2-D2 droid NPCs with multiple color variants
Extensive sound effects and music (lightsaber sounds, Cantina Band)
Custom blocks and structures (Imperial doors, tents, railings)
Spaceship召唤 system with Ship Call Beacon
publicApiSurface: Lightsaber variants: Anakin, Luke, Maul, Darksaber
Kyber Crystals: Clear, Blue, Green, Red, Gold, Purple, Orange, White
Blocks: Imperial Blast Door, Mos Eisley Door, Imperial Lamp
Items: Ship Call Beacon, Laser Weapon Bench
Sound Events: Lightsaber sounds, Blaster sounds, Cantina Band music
